title: Serialize runtime tests and wire ASan bridge archive

source.subject: fix(ci): serialize runtime tests and wire ASan bridge archive in superrepo

body:
Runtime test jobs serialize execution and link the ASan bridge archive so AddressSanitizer builds do not race or miss symbols on Linux CI.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`e8bc073`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/e8bc073)
- **Subject:** fix(ci): serialize runtime tests and wire ASan bridge archive in superrepo
- **Completed:** 2026-05-24

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `ci-release`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-post-merge-ci`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **CI and integration hardening** (`v03-post-merge-ci`).
